tldr: Import AI 462 explores superpersuasion, self-sustaining AI systems, and paths to artificial superintelligence — a thoughtful survey of where the frontier is heading.

articles.title: Import AI 462: Superpersuasion; self-sustaining AI; paths to ASI
articles.summary: Explores AI-powered superpersuasion risks, self-sustaining AI systems that bootstrap their own improvement, and debated paths to ASI.
